# Organization Sample

| Resource | `tenantmanagercontrolplane/Organization` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.

#
# Tenant Manager Control Plane does not expose CreateOrganization or DeleteOrganization.
# This sample binds an existing Organization by OCID and optionally
# reconciles defaultUcmSubscriptionId in place.
#
apiVersion: tenantmanagercontrolplane.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: Organization
metadata:
  name: organization-sample
spec:
  organizationId: ocid1.organization.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  defaultUcmSubscriptionId: ocid1.subscription.oc1..exampleuniqueID
```
